questions.text: An expression with one term is called:
questions.explanation: A monomial has one term (e.g., 5x). Binomial has two terms, trinomial has three terms.

questions.text: Like terms have the same variables raised to same powers.
questions.explanation: Like terms have identical algebraic factors. Example: 3x²y and 5x²y are like terms.

questions.text: What is the degree of a polynomial?
questions.correctAnswer: The highest power of the variable in the polynomial.
questions.explanation: Degree is the highest exponent. Example: 3x² + 5x + 2 has degree 2.
The numerical coefficient is the number multiplying the variables. In -5xy, it's -5.
